description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a steep gable roof and a prominent front-facing triangular peak. The exterior is clad in light-colored siding, with multiple rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors. A spacious balcony with white balustrades extends from the upper floor, providing an outdoor area above the main entrance. The roof is dark gray and contrasts with the lighter walls, while the windows are framed in white. The main entryway is located on the ground floor, featuring a simple door and a small overhang. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional American suburban homes, with clean lines and functional outdoor space.
description: A two-story house with a steep gable roof, light siding, symmetrical windows, and an upper-floor balcony with white railings. The design is traditional and suburban, with a prominent front peak and a simple entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the steep gable roof, two rows of windows, and the main facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dark roof, upper balcony with white railings, and a single window on the upper floor.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the balcony, double doors leading to the outdoor space, and the symmetrical arrangement of windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with multiple windows, the main entry door, and the balcony visible on the left.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small overhang, no steps, and minimal decorative elements.
